summary.intent: Fix the onboarding model list to sort models most-recent-first (matching the settings view) and collapse to show only the top 3 models with a 'view more' toggle.
summary.outcome: Added local expansion state, sorted filteredModels by recommended > createdAt desc, sliced to top 3 by default, and added a 'Show more' toggle in OnboardingProviderRow in onboarding-view.js. Changes were linted, committed, and pushed.

repo: The settings view already sorts models most-recent-first, but onboarding-view.js had no sorting applied to filteredModels — a parity gap between the two views.
Model list expansion state is managed locally in OnboardingProviderRow with useState, not lifted to a parent.

code.finding: OnboardingProviderRow uses modelSearch as a prop; filteredModels is derived locally. Sorting (recommended > createdAt desc) and slicing (top 3) were added here alongside a new showAllModels useState toggle.

workflow: useState was already imported in onboarding-view.js, so no import changes were needed.
Lint + commit + push was run as a background task and verified via task notification output file.

friction: The working tree was clean when 'commit and push' was requested mid-session, indicating a prior push had already captured in-flight changes — required a status check to confirm nothing was missed.
open_items: The 'Show more models' toggle text and styling were not specified — may need design review for consistency with the rest of the onboarding UI.
No test coverage mentioned for the new sort/collapse behavior in onboarding-view.js.
